race.comment: DELAGO SERG (4) didn't give his rivals a sniff two back at the Sapphire Coast when leading all the way. Went desperately close to repeating the dose last time. Will look to do the same from his wide draw. THE ADIGE (3) dug deep to edge out his rivals when resuming at Queanbeyan. Is still lightly raced and has a lot more to offer. The added trip won't bother the slightest. TURN LEFT (12) doesn't win out of turn and while she couldn't pay her supporters last time at Moruya her run was full of merit when closing off strongly late. If Boudvillain can have her a bit closer this time, she will prove awfully tough to hold out. SWEET TREATS (6) is yet to put it all together this campaign but has shown glimpses. Could land in a sticky spot from the inside draw if slowly away but her record here suggests she will run well.
